FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class DWriteItemizer

Namespace
FluentGpu.Text.DirectWrite
Assembly
FluentGpu.Text.DirectWrite.dll

DirectWrite itemizer (text.md §4.4): segments text into BiDi × script runs and computes UAX #14 line-break opportunities via IDWriteTextAnalyzer. DirectWrite calls back into the hand-authored callee CCWs FluentGpu.Text.DirectWrite.TextAnalysisSourceCcw (supplies the text) and FluentGpu.Text.DirectWrite.TextAnalysisSinkCcw (collects the runs). COM bound via TerraFX raw pointers; the CCW vtables mirror the ComputeSharp PixelShaderEffect pattern. Single-thread-confined: Itemize(ReadOnlySpan<char>, List<ItemRun>, List<BreakOpp>) calls AnalyzeBidi/Script/LineBreakpoints serially on the caller thread.

public sealed class DWriteItemizer : ITextItemizer, IDisposable

object

Methods

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

Itemize(ReadOnlySpan<char>, List<ItemRun>, List<BreakOpp>)

Itemize text into runs (BiDi × script segmentation, logical order) and breaks (one entry per UTF-16 unit). Both lists are cleared and refilled.

public void Itemize(ReadOnlySpan<char> text, List<ItemRun> runs, List<BreakOpp> breaks)

Parameters

text ReadOnlySpan<char>
runs List<ItemRun>
breaks List<BreakOpp>

SelfTest()

Smoke test on the real DirectWrite analyzer (Windows only): itemize a mixed LTR/RTL/CJK string and print the runs + break opportunities. Proves the CCW round-trip works without an access violation.

public static void SelfTest()
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
